#### 📄 `microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tickets/components/survey-link-dialog/survey-link-dialog.component.html`
```diff
commit 80b00f9aa7171fc9977bbadad121d57aa251caa0
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Mon Apr 27 14:01:47 2026 -0300

    se cierran las user history de historial exportable y encuestas del cliente

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tickets/components/survey-link-dialog/survey-link-dialog.component.html
@@ -0,0 +1,65 @@
+<h2 mat-dialog-title>{{ data.title }}</h2>
+
+<mat-dialog-content class="survey-link-dialog__content">
+  <p class="survey-link-dialog__message">{{ data.message }}</p>
+
+  @if (data.surveyResponse; as surveyResponse) {
+    <section class="survey-link-dialog__response-block" aria-label="Detalle de respuesta de encuesta">
+      <div class="survey-link-dialog__grid">
+        <div>
+          <p class="survey-link-dialog__label">Cliente</p>
+          <p class="survey-link-dialog__value">{{ surveyResponse.customer_name }}</p>
+        </div>
+        <div>
+          <p class="survey-link-dialog__label">Empresa</p>
+          <p class="survey-link-dialog__value">{{ surveyResponse.customer_company }}</p>
+        </div>
+      </div>
+
+      <div class="survey-link-dialog__rating" aria-label="Calificación">
+        @for (star of ratingScale; track star) {
+          <mat-icon [class.survey-link-dialog__rating-star--filled]="star <= surveyResponse.rating">star</mat-icon>
+        }
+        <span class="survey-link-dialog__rating-value">{{ surveyResponse.rating }} / 5</span>
+      </div>
+
+      @if (surveyResponse.comment) {
+        <div>
+          <p class="survey-link-dialog__label">Comentario</p>
+          <p class="survey-link-dialog__value">{{ surveyResponse.comment }}</p>
+        </div>
+      }
+
+      @if (surveyAttachments.length > 0) {
+        <app-ticket-attachments-section
+          [attachments]="surveyAttachments"
+          sectionTitle="Archivos adjuntos de la encuesta"
+          readonlySubtitle="Imágenes y videos enviados por el cliente en la encuesta."
+          emptyMessage="La encuesta no tiene adjuntos."
+        />
+      }
+    </section>
+  }
+
+  @if (data.surveyUrl) {
+    <div class="survey-link-dialog__link-block">
+      <p class="survey-link-dialog__label">Link</p>
+      <a [href]="data.surveyUrl" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">{{ data.surveyUrl }}</a>
+    </div>
+  }
+
+  @if (data.details) {
+    <p class="survey-link-dialog__details">{{ data.details }}</p>
+  }
+</mat-dialog-content>
+
+<mat-dialog-actions align="end">
+  @if (data.copyEnabled && data.surveyUrl) {
+    <button mat-stroked-button type="button" (click)="copyLink()">
+      <mat-icon>content_copy</mat-icon>
+      <span>Copiar link</span>
+    </button>
+  }
+
+  <button mat-flat-button color="primary" type="button" (click)="close()">Cerrar</button>
+</mat-dialog-actions>
```

#### 📄 `microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tickets/components/survey-link-dialog/survey-link-dialog.component.scss`
```diff
commit 80b00f9aa7171fc9977bbadad121d57aa251caa0
Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Mon Apr 27 14:01:47 2026 -0300

    se cierran las user history de historial exportable y encuestas del cliente

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tickets/components/survey-link-dialog/survey-link-dialog.component.scss
@@ -0,0 +1,89 @@
+.survey-link-dialog__content {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.8rem;
+}
+
+.survey-link-dialog__message,
+.survey-link-dialog__label,
+.survey-link-dialog__details {
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.survey-link-dialog__value {
+  margin: 0.2rem 0 0;
+  font-size: 0.92rem;
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.survey-link-dialog__response-block {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.85rem;
+  padding: 0.9rem;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.1);
+  border-radius: 0.8rem;
+  background: rgba(249, 250, 252, 0.7);
+}
+
+.survey-link-dialog__grid {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
+  gap: 0.65rem;
+}
+
+.survey-link-dialog__rating {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 0.2rem;
+}
+
+.survey-link-dialog__rating mat-icon {
+  color: #d2d4d8;
+  width: 1.1rem;
+  height: 1.1rem;
+  font-size: 1.1rem;
+}
+
+.survey-link-dialog__rating-star--filled {
+  color: #f59e0b !important;
+}
+
+.survey-link-dialog__rating-value {
+  margin-left: 0.45rem;
+  font-size: 0.9rem;
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.survey-link-dialog__link-block {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 0.35rem;
+  padding: 0.8rem;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(23, 24, 26, 0.12);
+  border-radius: 0.8rem;
+  background: rgba(249, 250, 252, 0.9);
+}
+
+.survey-link-dialog__label {
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  font-size: 0.72rem;
+  font-weight: 800;
+  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+.survey-link-dialog__link-block a {
+  color: var(--brand-red);
+  font-size: 0.88rem;
+  font-weight: 700;
+  line-break: anywhere;
+}
+
+.survey-link-dialog__details {
+  color: var(--text-secondary);
+  font-size: 0.84rem;
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 640px) {
+  .survey-link-dialog__grid {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+}
```

```diff

Author: Valentino_Colella <valentinocolella@microtv.com.ar>
Date:   Mon Apr 27 14:01:47 2026 -0300

    se cierran las user history de historial exportable y encuestas del cliente

new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/microtv-crm-frontend/src/app/features/tickets/components/survey-link-dialog/survey-link-dialog.component.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,97 @@
+import { ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component, inject } from '@angular/core';
+import { MatButtonModule } from '@angular/material/button';
+import {
+  MAT_DIALOG_DATA,
+  MatDialogActions,
+  MatDialogContent,
+  MatDialogModule,
+  MatDialogRef,
+  MatDialogTitle
+} from '@angular/material/dialog';
+import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon';
+import { MatSnackBar, MatSnackBarModule } from '@angular/material/snack-bar';
+
+import { SatisfactionResponseDetailResponse } from '../../../../core/models/ticket-management.model';
+import { TicketAttachment } from '../../../../core/models/ticket-attachment.model';
+import { TicketAttachmentsSectionComponent } from '../ticket-attachments-section/ticket-attachments-section.component';
+
+export interface SurveyLinkDialogData {
+  title: string;
+  message: string;
+  surveyUrl?: string | null;
+  details?: string | null;
+  copyEnabled?: boolean;
+  surveyResponse?: SatisfactionResponseDetailResponse | null;
+}
+
+@Component({
+  selector: 'app-survey-link-dialog',
+  standalone: true,
+  imports: [
+    MatButtonModule,
+    MatDialogActions,
+    MatDialogContent,
+    MatDialogModule,
+    MatDialogTitle,
+    MatIconModule,
+    MatSnackBarModule,
+    TicketAttachmentsSectionComponent
+  ],
+  templateUrl: './survey-link-dialog.component.html',
+  styleUrl: './survey-link-dialog.component.scss',
+  changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
+})
+export class SurveyLinkDialogComponent {
+  readonly data = inject<SurveyLinkDialogData>(MAT_DIALOG_DATA);
+  readonly ratingScale = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];
+  readonly surveyAttachments = this.mapSurveyAttachments(this.data.surveyResponse);
+
+  private readonly snackBar = inject(MatSnackBar);
+  private readonly dialogRef = inject(MatDialogRef<SurveyLinkDialogComponent>);
+
+  copyLink(): void {
+    const surveyUrl = this.data.surveyUrl?.trim();
+    if (!surveyUrl) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    navigator.clipboard
+      ?.writeText(surveyUrl)
+      .then(() => {
+        this.snackBar.open('Link copiado al portapapeles.', 'Cerrar', { duration: 3000 });
+      })
+      .catch(() => {
+        this.snackBar.open('No se pudo copiar el link automáticamente.', 'Cerrar', { duration: 4000 });
+      });
+  }
+
+  close(): void {
+    this.dialogRef.close();
+  }
+
+  private mapSurveyAttachments(response: SatisfactionResponseDetailResponse | null | undefined): TicketAttachment[] {
+    if (!response?.media_files?.length) {
+      return [];
+    }
+
+    return response.media_files.map((media) => ({
+      id: media.id,
+      fileName: media.file_name?.trim() 
... (código truncado por longitud) ...
```
